story_summary: On the night of the Equinox Chime, the harbormaster Salia and Boxwell's old apprentice Tobias trace the cobalt lens and the missing instruments to the Lantern Walk, and set the Tideclock right.

entities.summary: A patient travelling clockmaker who carries a cedar case of tools.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Boxwell waited for the equinox with his hand on the regulator.

entities.summary: The deep-blue lens Marina cast for the Tideclock, which bends the equinox light onto the dial.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The cobalt lens caught the low equinox sun.

entities.summary: The twice-yearly chiming when the Tideclock and the sun agree; the town's great festival.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The whole coast gathered for the Equinox Chime.

entities.summary: A lantern-hung seafront promenade where the coast strolls on festival nights.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The Lantern Walk blazed end to end.

entities.summary: The coast's sharp-eyed harbormaster, who keeps the tide-tables.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Salia read the tide-tables like a book of hours.

entities.summary: Boxwell's apprentice from Harrow Hollow, grown and now sailed to the coast to help.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Tobias had followed his master to the sea.

claims.evidence_excerpt: Salia was harbormaster of the Saltleigh Docks.
Boxwell fitted the cobalt lens to the Tideclock.
The chime was rung from the Lantern Walk.
Salia came to rely on the clockmaker's eye.

chunks.title: The Equinox Chime
chunks.body: Twice a year the Tideclock and the sun agree and the whole of Clockwork Coast gathers on the Lantern Walk for the Equinox Chime.

chunks.title: Tobias returns
chunks.body: Boxwell's apprentice Tobias, grown since Harrow Hollow, has sailed to the coast and works at his master's side again.

chunks.title: Continuity: The Equinox Chime
chunks.body: Previous story summary: with Salia and Tobias, Boxwell fitted the cobalt lens and set the Tideclock right in time for the Equinox Chime.

open_questions: Now that the Tideclock is true again, will Fenwick make peace?
